query:
SELECT psd.userId, psd.businessDate, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS distinctEventCount, COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS duplicateCount, ROUND(SUM(psd.earnedPoints) * 100, 2) AS displayPoints
FROM productivity_score_details psd
WHERE psd.userId = 750192
  AND psd.businessDate = '2026-05-13'
GROUP BY psd.userId, psd.businessDate;
SELECT businessDate, totalPoints, rawAchievementRate, finalKpiScore, avgProcessHours
FROM engineer_daily_productivity
WHERE userId = 750192
  AND businessDate = '2026-05-13';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS missingKpiRows
FROM products p
JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.stationEventType = 'complete' AND se.stationCode = 'A1'
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
  AND psd.id IS NULL;

FROM productivity_score_details psd

SELECT businessDate, totalPoints, rawAchievementRate, finalKpiScore, avgProcessHours
FROM engineer_daily_productivity
WHERE userId = 750192
  AND businessDate = '2026-05-13';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS missingKpiRows
FROM products p
JOIN station_events se ON se.productId = p.id AND se.stationEventType = 'complete' AND se.stationCode = 'A1'
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
  AND psd.id IS NULL;
